title: Switzerland (Canton Zürich) Self-Employment Worksheet — Commercial Bookkeeping (Hilfsblatt A mit kaufmännischer Buchführung)
description: The Canton of Zürich's companion schedule to the personal income and wealth tax return for natural persons (ch/zh/sta/steuererklaerung-natuerliche-personen), used by a self-employed taxpayer who keeps full commercial (kaufmännische) books — as opposed to the simplified, single-entry bookkeeping covered by its sibling schedule ch/zh/sta/hilfsblatt-a-vereinfachte-buchfuehrung — to transcribe their signed annual financial statements (Geschäftsabschluss) into the tax-relevant self-employment income and business-equity figures. Unlike its simplified-bookkeeping sibling, this worksheet takes the net profit/loss and the balance-sheet totals directly from the signed accounts rather than building them up from itemized revenue/cost/asset lines. Referenced by the main return's own Ziffer 2 (self-employment income, Seite 2), Ziffer 16.1 (a further voluntary pension buy-in contribution, Seite 3), and Ziffer 32 (business equity excluding real estate/securities, Seite 4). This document models: the household/business header (firm name and seat, business activity, geschäftsjahr dates, AHVN13, municipality, name, which of the four main-return self-employment lines this worksheet supports, the filer-entered tax year, UID, and secondary tax domiciles); three supplementary disclosure figures used only for inter-cantonal tax-allocation (Steuerausscheidung) purposes (gross turnover, cost of materials/goods/third-party services, and debt interest per the income statement); the AHV-basis income computation (Ziffer 1-3), the tax-basis corrections and resulting self-employment income (Ziffer 4-5); the bounded 4-line/2-timepoint inventory table (Ziffer 6.1-6.4); a free-text depreciation-schedule summary (see Known Gaps below for what it defers); the balance-sheet-derived business assets (Ziffer 8) and liabilities (Ziffer 9); and both equity computations (Ziffer 10.1-10.4 ordinary; Ziffer 11.1-11.4 AHV-notification) plus the separate voluntary pension buy-in contribution (Ziffer 12). It does NOT model: Ziffer 10.1, 10.2, 11.1, and 11.2, since each is the exact same figure already captured once elsewhere on this same form (totalGeschaeftsaktivenOhneWertschriften, totalFremdkapital, and totalGeschaeftsaktiven respectively) re-printed a second (or, for totalFremdkapital, third) time at a different line number, per this registry's convention of not re-declaring an identical value under two field names; or the depreciation table's own per-asset-category, per-metric breakdown (5 asset categories x 7 metrics = 35 cells, Ziffer 7.1-7.14), an unbounded/multi-dimensional repeating structure collapsed to a single free-text summary field per this registry's established treatment (see e.g. ch/zh/sta/hilfsblatt-a-vereinfachte-buchfuehrung, ch/zh/sta/schuldenverzeichnis, ch/zh/sta/liegenschaftenverzeichnis). It does not submit the return; the live source (zh.ch / the ZHprivateTax online filing portal) is always authoritative. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Switzerland, the Canton of Zürich, or its Kantonales Steueramt.

authority.name: Kanton Zürich — Finanzdirektion, Kantonales Steueramt Zürich

source.documentRef: StA Form. 329 (2021) 12.21 — Hilfsblatt A für Selbständigerwerbende mit kaufmännischer Buchführung, Kanton Zürich (2-page schedule: Seite 1 header + Ziffer 1-6 and Nebensteuerdomizile; Seite 2 Ziffer 7-12 and signature), read together with the main return it is a companion to, ch/zh/sta/steuererklaerung-natuerliche-personen, whose own Ziffer 2 (Seite 2), Ziffer 16.1 (Seite 3), and Ziffer 32 (Seite 4) reference this document by name, and with the Kantonales Steueramt Zürich's own 'Wegleitung zur Steuererklärung 2025' at https://www.zh.ch/content/dam/zhweb/bilder-dokumente/themen/steuern-finanzen/steuern/natuerlichepersonen/2025/est-wegleitungen/305_Wegleitung_ZH_2025_HA%20bf%20DEF.pdf, whose own Ziffer-32 row prints 'Selbständigerwerbende mit kaufmännischer Buchführung übertragen das Eigenkapital laut Hilfsblatt A (Ziff. 10.4) auf die Seite 4 der Steuererklärung in die Ziff. 32' (discussed in VERIFICATION.md).

verification.notes: GOV-1910: GovSchema Standard Research cycle. Picks up the sole remaining CH-ZH companion-schedule gap the GOV-1903 (Hilfsblatt A, vereinfachte Buchführung, Form 328) cycle left open by name — Form 329 (Hilfsblatt A's kaufmännische-Buchhaltung variant), Hilfsblatt B (Form 330, agricultural questionnaire), and Hilfsblatt G (Form 331, agricultural/forestry) — pursuing only Form 329, the sibling of the already-published Form 328 and the most directly comparable in scope; Hilfsblatt B/G remain deferred as separate, larger (4-page, livestock/crop-specific) future candidates. The zh.ch tax-forms hub page (steuererklaerung-natuerliche-personen.html) was re-fetched fresh this cycle and confirmed all three of Form 329/330/331 are hosted at the same year-independent '.../jahrunabhaengig/selbstaendig-erwerbende/...' path as Form 328, and — despite each carrying a stale-looking 2020/2021 filename date stamp — each is labelled on the page without a 'bis <year>' cutoff qualifier (unlike the page's own superseded 2021-dated copy of Form 328 itself, explicitly labelled 'bis 2023'), confirming all three are the current, unsuperseded editions; this is a durable pattern worth checking on any future zh.ch companion-schedule candidate whose filename date looks old. The form (329_hilfsblatt_a_kaufmaennischer_zh_2021_def.pdf, 112,995 bytes, 2 pages, %PDF-1.4, no /Encrypt) was fetched directly from that listing. A byte-level scan for '/AcroForm' (zero matches) and '/Widget' (zero matches) confirms this is a flat, non-AcroForm print/reference PDF, the same shape as all eight of its CH-ZH sibling schedules. This is a materially smaller document than its Form-328 sibling (2 pages / 51 fields vs. 4 pages / 85 fields) because commercial-bookkeeping filers transcribe figures directly from their own signed balance sheet and income statement (Ziffer 1.1, 8.1, 9.1) rather than building each figure up from itemized revenue/cost/asset lines the way Form 328's simplified-bookkeeping filers must. The Kantonales Steueramt's own 2025 Wegleitung was re-fetched and searched for a worked specimen of this form's own internal lines: none was found (the same negative finding several prior CH-ZH cycles have already made for their own forms), but its own explanatory prose for main-return Ziffer 32 explicitly names this form's Ziffer 10.4 as the transfer source ('Selbständigerwerbende mit kaufmännischer Buchführung übertragen das Eigenkapital laut Hilfsblatt A (Ziff. 10.4) auf die Seite 4 der Steuererklärung in die Ziff. 32', distinguishing it by name from the Ziff. 14.4 transfer for the vereinfachte-Buchführung sibling) — independently corroborating this schema's own eigenkapitalSelbstaendigerwerbenderOhneGeschaeftswertschriften field and its Ziffer number, and by the same logic (both variants feed the identical main-return Ziffer 2/16.1/32 lines) the Ziffer 2 and 16.1 transfers already printed on the form's own face. This schema's own worked mock-data example (see VERIFICATION.md) was constructed independently and its arithmetic hand-recomputed end-to-end (Ziffer 3 AHV-subtotal, Ziffer 5 tax-basis income, Ziffer 8.3/8.5 total assets, Ziffer 9.3 total liabilities, Ziffer 10.4 and 11.4 equity), not copied from any official specimen. Switzerland remains at 2 of its 6 verticals (DMV, Taxes) — a companion schedule, not a new vertical — but further deepens Taxes-vertical coverage, leaving Hilfsblatt B (Form 330) and Hilfsblatt G (Form 331) as the two remaining open CH-ZH companion-schedule backlog candidates. See VERIFICATION.md for the full field-by-field source mapping, every disclosed scope decision, and the worked mock-data example.

fields.name: firmennameUndSitz
fields.label: Firmenname und Sitz
fields.description: The business's trading name and registered seat (municipality). For a sole proprietorship this is typically the proprietor's own name plus the trade name, if any.

fields.name: brancheOderArtDerGeschaeftstaetigkeit
fields.label: Branche/Art der Geschäftstätigkeit
fields.description: The industry sector or nature of the business activity carried on.

fields.name: namenUndAdressenMitgesellschafter
fields.label: Namen und Adressen der Mitgesellschafter bzw. Partner
fields.description: Names and addresses of co-partners (bei Personengesellschaft, einfacher Gesellschaft sowie bei Praxis-/Bürogemeinschaft) — completed only when the business is a general/simple partnership or a shared practice/office community with more than one participant.

fields.name: geschaeftsjahrVon
fields.label: Geschäftsjahr vom
fields.description: Start date of the business (fiscal) year this worksheet covers.

fields.name: geschaeftsjahrBis
fields.label: Geschäftsjahr bis (resp. Datum Abschluss der Liquidation)
fields.description: End date of the business (fiscal) year, or the date liquidation was completed if the business ceased during the year.

fields.name: ahvn13RemainingDigits
fields.label: AHVN13 (13-stellig)
fields.description: The remaining 10 digits of the business owner's 13-digit Swiss social security number (AHVN13); the first three digits, 756 (Switzerland's fixed country prefix), are pre-printed in the form's own boxes.

fields.name: gemeinde
fields.label: Gemeinde
fields.description: The taxpayer's municipality of residence (Gemeinde) within Canton Zürich.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Name
fields.description: The taxpayer's surname.

fields.name: vorname
fields.label: Vorname
fields.description: The taxpayer's first name(s).

fields.name: erwerbsart
fields.label: Haupterwerb/Nebenerwerb, Person 1/Person 2
fields.description: Which of the main return's own four self-employment income lines (Ziffer 2.1/2.2, Person 1/Person 2) this particular worksheet supports — a separate Hilfsblatt A is filed per self-employed activity and per person.

fields.name: jahr
fields.label: Jahr
fields.description: The tax year this worksheet is filed for, entered by the filer since this form is hosted at a year-independent URL and carries no tax year printed on its own cover.

fields.name: uidChe
fields.label: UID CHE
fields.description: The business's Swiss Unique Business Identification Number (UID), if it has one.

fields.name: nebensteuerdomizile
fields.label: Nebensteuerdomizile
fields.description: Secondary tax domiciles (Betriebsstätten und Liegenschaften) — permanent establishments and business real estate located in another Zürich municipality, another canton, or abroad.

fields.name: bruttoumsatz
fields.label: Bruttoumsatz
fields.description: Gross turnover of the business per the signed income statement, disclosed as supplementary detail for inter-cantonal tax-allocation (Steuerausscheidung) purposes. Does not feed any computed total on this worksheet.

fields.name: aufwandMaterialWarenDrittleistungen
fields.label: Aufwand für Material, Waren und Drittleistungen
fields.description: Cost of materials, goods, and third-party services per the signed income statement, disclosed as supplementary detail for inter-cantonal tax-allocation purposes. Does not feed any computed total on this worksheet.

fields.name: schuldzinsenGemaessErfolgsrechnung
fields.label: Schuldzinsen gemäss Erfolgsrechnung (für Steuerausscheidungszwecke)
fields.description: Debt interest per the signed income statement, disclosed explicitly for inter-cantonal tax-allocation (Steuerausscheidung) purposes. Does not feed any computed total on this worksheet.

fields.name: reingewinnOderVerlustGemaessErfolgsrechnung
fields.label: 1.1 Reingewinn bzw. -verlust gemäss Erfolgsrechnung
fields.description: Net profit, or loss (negative), per the signed income statement (Erfolgsrechnung) — the starting point for the AHV-basis and tax-basis self-employment income computations below. Unlike its simplified-bookkeeping sibling, this figure is taken directly from the signed accounts rather than built up from itemized revenue/cost lines.

fields.name: barbezuegeEigensalaereEigenkapitalzinsen
fields.label: 2.1 Barbezüge, Eigensaläre und Eigenkapitalzinsen
fields.description: Cash withdrawals, salary the owner pays themself, and interest credited on their own equity account — added back since these are not deductible business expenses for a self-employed person.

fields.name: persoenlicheVorsorgebeitraege2Und3SaeuleA
fields.label: 2.2 Persönliche Vorsorgebeiträge 2. Säule und 3. Säule a
fields.description: The owner's own contributions to the occupational pension fund (2nd pillar) and tied individual retirement savings (3rd pillar a), added back here since only the employer-equivalent share (or half, if the business has no staff) is deductible as a business expense — the remaining contributions, buy-ins, and all 3rd-pillar-a contributions are instead deducted directly on the main return.

fields.name: weitereAufrechnungen
fields.label: 2.3 Weitere Aufrechnungen
fields.description: Further add-backs not already captured above, e.g. private insurance premiums and taxes booked as a business expense.

fields.name: naturalbezuegeUndPrivatanteileUnkosten
fields.label: 2.4 Naturalbezüge und Privatanteile an den Unkosten
fields.description: Goods or services the owner withdrew from the business for private use, plus the private-use share of costs booked as business expenses.

fields.name: weitereKorrekturen
fields.label: 2.5 Weitere Korrekturen
fields.description: Further corrections, e.g. the imputed rental value of a privately-used dwelling on business premises, the private-use share of vehicle costs, or a change in hidden reserves already taxed as income. May be negative (filer enters a minus sign).

fields.name: subtotalEinkuenfteSelbstaendigeErwerbstaetigkeitAhv
fields.label: 3. Subtotal = Einkünfte aus selbständiger Erwerbstätigkeit für AHV-Zwecke
fields.description: Self-employment income for AHV (social-insurance) purposes: reingewinnOderVerlustGemaessErfolgsrechnung plus barbezuegeEigensalaereEigenkapitalzinsen plus persoenlicheVorsorgebeitraege2Und3SaeuleA plus weitereAufrechnungen plus naturalbezuegeUndPrivatanteileUnkosten plus weitereKorrekturen.

fields.name: persoenlicheAhvIvEoBeitraege
fields.label: 4.1 Persönliche AHV/IV/EO-Beiträge (in Ziff. 16.1 der Steuererklärung abzuziehen)
fields.description: The owner's own AHV/IV/EO contributions, added back here since they are deductible for tax purposes only on the main return's own Ziffer 16.1, not as a business expense.

fields.name: abzueglichBruttoertraegeGeschaeftswertschriften
fields.label: 4.2 Abzüglich verbuchte Bruttoerträge von Geschäftswertschriften und -guthaben, soweit im Wertschriftenverzeichnis enthalten
fields.description: Gross income from business securities and receivables already booked in profit, deducted here since it is taxed via the securities register (Wertschriftenverzeichnis) instead, avoiding double taxation.

fields.name: weitereAbzuege
fields.label: 4.3 Weitere Abzüge
fields.description: Further tax-purpose deductions, e.g. an offset against a prior-year business loss carried forward (Verrechnung Vorjahresverluste).

fields.name: einkuenfteSelbstaendigeErwerbstaetigkeit
fields.label: 5. Einkünfte aus selbständiger Erwerbstätigkeit
fields.description: Self-employment income for tax purposes: subtotalEinkuenfteSelbstaendigeErwerbstaetigkeitAhv plus persoenlicheAhvIvEoBeitraege minus abzueglichBruttoertraegeGeschaeftswertschriften minus weitereAbzuege. Transfers to the main return's own self-employment income field (Seite 2, Ziffer 2).

fields.name: warenlagerAnschaffungskostenBeginn
fields.label: 6.1 Anschaffungs- oder Herstellungskosten (bzw. maximal Marktwert) — Beginn Geschäftsjahr
fields.description: Inventory (Warenlager) acquisition or production cost, or market value if lower, at the start of the business year.

fields.name: warenlagerAnschaffungskostenEnde
fields.label: 6.1 Anschaffungs- oder Herstellungskosten (bzw. maximal Marktwert) — Ende Geschäftsjahr
fields.description: Same as warenlagerAnschaffungskostenBeginn, at the end of the business year.

fields.name: warenlagerBuchwertBeginn
fields.label: 6.2 Buchwert — Beginn Geschäftsjahr
fields.description: Inventory book value per the accounts, at the start of the business year.

fields.name: warenlagerBuchwertEnde
fields.label: 6.2 Buchwert — Ende Geschäftsjahr
fields.description: Same as warenlagerBuchwertBeginn, at the end of the business year.

fields.name: warenlagerUnterbewertungBeginn
fields.label: 6.3 Unterbewertung (max. 1/3 Warenreserve) — Beginn Geschäftsjahr
fields.description: The inventory reserve (under-valuation) claimed, capped at one third of the inventory's cost/market value, at the start of the business year.

fields.name: warenlagerUnterbewertungEnde
fields.label: 6.3 Unterbewertung (max. 1/3 Warenreserve) — Ende Geschäftsjahr
fields.description: Same as warenlagerUnterbewertungBeginn, at the end of the business year.

fields.name: warenlagerUnterbewertungProzentBeginn
fields.label: 6.4 Unterbewertung in % des unter 6.1 angegebenen Wertes — Beginn Geschäftsjahr
fields.description: The inventory reserve at warenlagerUnterbewertungBeginn expressed as a percentage of warenlagerAnschaffungskostenBeginn.

fields.name: warenlagerUnterbewertungProzentEnde
fields.label: 6.4 Unterbewertung in % des unter 6.1 angegebenen Wertes — Ende Geschäftsjahr
fields.description: Same as warenlagerUnterbewertungProzentBeginn, at the end of the business year.

fields.name: depreciationScheduleSummary
fields.label: 7. Abschreibungstabelle
fields.description: Free-text summary of the depreciation schedule (Ziffer 7.1-7.14): for each of five asset categories (Geschäftsliegenschaft, Fahrzeuge, Maschinen/Werkzeuge, Einrichtungen, Mobilien), the opening book value, additions, disposals, value before depreciation, booked depreciation, depreciation rate, and closing book value. Collapsed to one field per this registry's established treatment of unbounded/multi-dimensional repeating tables (35 cells across 5 categories x 7 metrics); unlike its simplified-bookkeeping sibling, no aggregate booked-depreciation figure transfers elsewhere on this worksheet, since depreciation here is already reflected in the signed balance sheet's own asset values (Ziffer 8.1).

fields.name: aktivenLautBilanz
fields.label: 8.1 Aktiven laut Bilanz
fields.description: Total business assets as shown on the signed balance sheet.

fields.name: alsEinkommenVersteuerteStilleReservenAktiven
fields.label: 8.2 Als Einkommen versteuerte stille Reserven (gemäss Aufstellung)
fields.description: Hidden reserves already taxed as income, per a separate statement, added back to the balance-sheet asset total.

fields.name: totalGeschaeftsaktiven
fields.label: 8.3 Total Geschäftsaktiven
fields.description: Total business assets: aktivenLautBilanz plus alsEinkommenVersteuerteStilleReservenAktiven. Reprinted a second time at Ziffer 11.1 (not separately modelled since it is the identical figure).

fields.name: abzueglichGeschaeftswertschriftenAktiven
fields.label: 8.4 Abzüglich Geschäftswertschriften und -guthaben, soweit im Wertschriftenverzeichnis enthalten
fields.description: Business securities and receivables already reported on the Wertschriftenverzeichnis (securities register), deducted here to avoid counting the same asset twice.

fields.name: totalGeschaeftsaktivenOhneWertschriften
fields.label: 8.5 Total Geschäftsaktiven ohne Geschäftswertschriften
fields.description: Total business assets excluding securities: totalGeschaeftsaktiven minus abzueglichGeschaeftswertschriftenAktiven. Reprinted a second time at Ziffer 10.1 (not separately modelled since it is the identical figure).

fields.name: fremdkapitalLautBilanz
fields.label: 9.1 Fremdkapital laut Bilanz
fields.description: Total business liabilities as shown on the signed balance sheet.

fields.name: alsEinkommenVersteuerteStilleReservenFremdkapital
fields.label: 9.2 Als Einkommen versteuerte stille Reserven (gemäss Aufstellung)
fields.description: Hidden reserves already taxed as income, per a separate statement, deducted from the balance-sheet liability total.

fields.name: totalFremdkapital
fields.label: 9.3 Total Fremdkapital
fields.description: Total business liabilities: fremdkapitalLautBilanz minus alsEinkommenVersteuerteStilleReservenFremdkapital. Reprinted a second and third time at Ziffer 10.2 and Ziffer 11.2 (neither separately modelled since each is the identical figure).

fields.name: differenzEinkommenssteuerwertVermoegenssteuerwertGeschaeftsliegenschaften
fields.label: 10.3 Differenz Einkommenssteuerwert/Vermögenssteuerwert Geschäftsliegenschaften
fields.description: The difference between the income-tax value and the wealth-tax value of business real estate, added to or subtracted from business equity (filer enters a minus sign if negative).

fields.name: eigenkapitalSelbstaendigerwerbenderOhneGeschaeftswertschriften
fields.label: 10.4 Eigenkapital Selbständigerwerbender ohne Geschäftswertschriften
fields.description: Business equity for wealth-tax purposes: totalGeschaeftsaktivenOhneWertschriften minus totalFremdkapital plus/minus differenzEinkommenssteuerwertVermoegenssteuerwertGeschaeftsliegenschaften. Transfers to the main return's own business-equity field (Seite 4, Ziffer 32) — the Wegleitung's own Ziffer-32 prose names this exact Ziffer 10.4 as the transfer source for kaufmännische-Buchführung filers, distinguishing it from the Ziffer 14.4 transfer used by the vereinfachte-Buchführung sibling.

fields.name: differenzEinkommenssteuerwertRepartitionswertGeschaeftsliegenschaften
fields.label: 11.3 Differenz Einkommenssteuerwert/Repartitionswert Geschäftsliegenschaften
fields.description: The difference between the income-tax value and the inter-cantonal apportionment (Repartitionswert) value of business real estate, added to or subtracted from equity for the separate AHV-notification computation below (filer enters a minus sign if negative).

fields.name: ahvMeldendesEigenkapital
fields.label: 11.4 Der AHV zu meldendes im Betrieb investiertes Eigenkapital
fields.description: Business equity to be reported to the AHV compensation office: totalGeschaeftsaktiven minus totalFremdkapital plus/minus differenzEinkommenssteuerwertRepartitionswertGeschaeftsliegenschaften.

fields.name: einkaufsbeitragVorsorgeeinrichtung
fields.label: 12. Einkaufsbeitrag des Betriebsinhabers in die Vorsorgeeinrichtung
fields.description: A voluntary pension buy-in contribution the business owner paid into their occupational pension fund, not already included in the accounts as a business expense. Transfers to the main return's own Ziffer 16.1 (Seite 3) as a further deduction.

fields.name: placeOfSigning
fields.label: Ort und Datum — Ort
fields.description: Place where the worksheet is signed.

fields.name: dateOfSigning
fields.label: Ort und Datum — Datum
fields.description: Date the worksheet is signed.

documents.label: Unterzeichneter Geschäftsabschluss (Bilanz, Erfolgsrechnung und Anhang)
documents.sourceRef: Seite 1, header instructions ('einen unterzeichneten Geschäftsabschluss ... beizulegen')

documents.label: Auszüge (Kontoblätter aus dem Hauptbuch) sämtlicher Privat- und Eigenkapitalkonten
documents.sourceRef: Seite 1, header instructions ('sowie die Auszüge (= Kontoblätter aus dem Hauptbuch) sämtlicher Privat- und Eigenkapitalkonten beizulegen')

documents.label: Das Hilfsblatt ist vollständig und wahrheitsgetreu ausgefüllt
documents.statement: Das Hilfsblatt ist vollständig und wahrheitsgetreu ausgefüllt.

steps.title: Firma, Geschäftsjahr und Personalien (business identification and household header)
1-5. Einkünfte aus selbständiger Erwerbstätigkeit (self-employment income computation)
8-9. Geschäftsaktiven und Fremdkapital (business assets and liabilities)
10-12. Eigenkapital und Einkaufsbeitrag (equity and pension buy-in)
Ort, Datum und Unterschrift (place, date, and signature)
